data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Ascend Foundation/
data.description: The 2026 Ascend A-List Awards recognizing influential business leaders contributing to the future were announced on April 2, 2026 by the Ascend Foundation via PR Newswire. A revised version of the original news release has been issued by the company to address modifications. Further information can be found towards the conclusion of the release.

data.title: Atmus Filtration Technologies Set to Join S&P SmallCap 600
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc. (NYSE: ATMU) announced its upcoming inclusion in the S&P SmallCap 600 index, replacing Air Lease Corp. (NYSE: AL). The change will take effect before the market opens on Thursday, April 9. Additionally, Sumitomo Corporation & a Consortium are in the process of acquiring Air Lease Corp in a significant deal.

data.title: ImageSource Releases ILINX on Microsoft SharePoint Embedded, Bringing AI-Powered Process Innovation to Microsoft 365
data.description: On April 2, 2026, ImageSource from Olympia, Washington, was recognized as a top performer in the Everest Group Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) Products PEAK Matrix® Assessment for 2026. They were one of only four companies to receive this prestigious designation. Known for their ILINX® intelligent automation platform, ImageSource has showcased exceptional performance in the industry.

data.title: Passco Companies' Andrew Dannenbaum Wins 2026 NMHC Young Guns Pitch Competition
data.description: Passco Companies, based in Irvine, California, shared exciting news on April 2, 2026, stating that Andrew Dannenbaum, the Vice President of Operations, emerged victorious in the 2026 NMHC Young Guns Pitch Competition. This competition took place at the National Multifamily Housing Council (NMHC) Annual Conference.

data.title: MGIC Investment Corporation Schedules 1st Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: Milwaukee-based MGIC Investment Corporation (NYSE: MTG) is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on April 29, 2026, following the market's closure. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate the release of these results, with a conference call/webcast slated for 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. This scheduled event will provide insights into the company's performance during the first part of the year, offering a comprehensive overview to interested parties.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Resilient As Oil Prices Spike, Tesla Slumps; Jobs Report On Tap
data.description: Stock prices surged this week despite a significant increase in oil prices, indicating a positive trend for investors. Tesla experienced a decline in its stock on Thursday due to lower-than-expected deliveries. The Dow Jones Futures show the stock market's resilience amidst the spike in oil prices and Tesla's slump. Additionally, investors are anticipating the upcoming jobs report. This information highlights the market dynamics, with stocks performing well overall despite specific fluctuations.

data.title: Virginia Business Names ThunderCat Technology to their 2026 Best Places to Work List
data.description: ThunderCat Technology has been recognized as the 2nd best employer in the mid-size category by Virginia Business. The accolade was bestowed on April 2, 2026, in Reston, Virginia. ThunderCat Technology was honored as one of the Best Places to Work in Virginia for 2026. This achievement is attributed to the partnership with Best Companies Group in hosting the awards ceremony.

data.title: The APAA Praises President Trump for Executive Order to Fully Enforce Aluminum Tariff
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in Washington, the American Primary Aluminum Association (APAA) commended President Trump for his Executive Order that addresses a loophole used by importers to evade the aluminum tariff. The loophole involved underreporting the value of imported aluminum. This action aims to ensure fair trade practices and protect the domestic aluminum industry. This move comes amid a surge in aluminum imports, which saw a 20% increase in the last year, reaching a total of 2 million metric tons. President Trump's order is designed to uphold the 10% tariff on aluminum imports, which has generated $500 million in revenue for the US government. The APAA lauded the President's decision, stating that it would help safeguard American jobs and promote a level playing field for the aluminum sector.

data.title: MESA LABS DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
data.description: In Lakewood, Colorado, on April 2, 2026, Mesa Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ: MLAB) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.16 per share of common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 29, 2026.

data.title: Merit Medical Systems to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: A healthcare technology leader, Merit Medical Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MMSI), based in South Jordan, Utah, will unveil its financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, post the market closure on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company has scheduled its investor conference call for the same day - April 30, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The call will be held at different times across other regions: 3:30 p.m. Central, 2:30 p.m. Mountain, and 1:30 p.m. Pacific.

data.title: The U.S. Aluminum Extruders Coalition Commends President Trump's Recent Executive Order Regarding Aluminum Tariff
data.description: On April 2, 2026, the U.S. Aluminum Extruders Coalition (USAEC) praised President Trump's recent Executive Order implementing a 50% aluminum tariff. This order addresses a significant loophole in enforcement related to the valuation of aluminum imports. Importers had been facing higher payments due to this issue.
Stantec renews buyback program and automatic share purchase plan.

data.title: Labrador Gold Announces Closing of Change of Business and Acquisition of Units of Northern Shield
data.description: Toronto-based Labrador Gold Corp. (TSX.V: LAB | FNR: 2N6) has officially gained approval from the TSX Venture Exchange for its Change of Business to become a hybrid Mining/investment issuer. Shareholders approved the change at the Annual General & Special Meeting on February 24, 2026. The Board of Directors, including Roger Moss, James Borland, Leo Karabelas, and Kevin Ramsay, opted to maintain the company name as Labrador Gold Corp. instead of renaming it Exin Ventures Inc. The Company's common shares will resume trading under the symbol "LAB" starting on Wednesday, March 11, 2026, following the lifting of the trading halt.

data.title: Thor Equities Secures $16M Financing for 139 Fifth Avenue in NYC’s Flatiron District
data.description: On March 3, 2026, Thor Equities Group, a prominent player in urban real estate development, leasing, and management, revealed securing a substantial $16 million in fresh funding from Northeast Bank. The financing is intended for 139 Fifth Avenue, situated in the renowned Flatiron District of New York City.

data.title: Anaptys Provides Update on Business Separation and Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 3, 2026, AnaptysBio, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANAB), a biotech company in San Diego, announced plans for a potential spin-off of its biopharma operations. The company, which is in the clinical stage and specializes in developing immunology therapeutics, also disclosed its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Loci Capital Completes Exit Through Strategic Recapitalization of Prose Stevens Pointe Multifamily Investment
data.description: Loci Capital has successfully completed the recapitalization exit of Prose Stevens Pointe, which is a workforce apartment community consisting of 264 units located in St. Cloud, Florida. This community is situated near Orlando, and the completion of this transaction marks a significant milestone in Loci Capital's investment strategy.
